title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
